result.headline: Strong fit—healthcare SaaS, AWS, TypeScript, DevOps, and regulated-industry experience.

reasons.detail: Built Sample Assist's drug-testing platform from zero on AWS, aligned with Australian Privacy Act and My Health Records Act requirements—direct healthcare compliance precedent.
5+ years production cloud work; built 20+ NestJS services in TypeScript at Sample Assist, integrated React across the product suite, all shipping to real users.
Designed and provisioned VPC, EKS, RDS Postgres, ALB, IAM in Terraform; integrated AWS Secrets Manager; cut 30% spend through right-sizing—exactly the hands-on AWS scope the JD describes.

reasons.point: DevOps + modern practices embedded in delivery
reasons.detail: Built GitOps pipeline (GitHub Actions + Argo CD), multi-env Helm deploys, Prometheus + Grafana observability, mobile CI/CD with Fastlane—DevOps is how I ship, not a separate function.

reasons.point: AI-assisted development as a working practice
reasons.detail: Shipped Startiny solo to the App Store using Claude Code for implementation; actively use AI in production workflows, not just theory.

relevantSkills: AWS EKS, ECS / Fargate, EC2, ALB / AWS Load Balancer Controller, RDS Postgres
GitHub Actions, Argo CD, GitOps workflows
IAM least-privilege, Encryption at rest / in transit
result.gaps: Haven't shipped React (web) as a primary platform—Sample Assist is mobile-first, so my React depth is narrower than the JD might expect.
result.closer: Happy to chat through how Sample Assist's healthcare + AWS foundation maps to Magentus—let's find a time.

result.headline: Strong backend + infra fit; web stack and AI-assisted shipping are less core to my work.

reasons.detail: Built and operated AWS platforms at scale (EKS, RDS, Postgres, Redis, Secrets Manager) — your construction domain needs reliable ops and deployment discipline.
Shipped Startiny (iOS App Store) in 2 weeks using Claude Code for implementation while I handled scope, product decisions, and correctness — exactly the AI-coding-tools experience you're asking for.
Designed and shipped the Coupon module and VNPAY integration at GGJungle — I think about market fit and user value, not just code.
You use TypeScript; I've built production backends in it (NestJS) with clean architecture, shared modules, and consistent standards across a multi-service platform.

result.gaps: NextJS and GoLang aren't in my core experience — I'm backend + platform focused, not frontend-first. Azure is new to me (I've shipped on AWS). The role emphasizes product + design hat; I'm confident in product thinking but less experienced leading design decisions.
result.closer: Happy to chat about how AI-assisted shipping translates to your stack and whether my backend rigor fits your architecture.
